narrative:
Newton Falls Village 3A (precinct in Trumbull County) has 908 registered voters, with 64.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.6 percentage points.
